# Skillnova — Pull Request

Thanks for contributing! Please fill in this template so we can review your PR quickly.

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR do and why? -->

## Linked issues

- Closes #
- Fixes #
- Relates to #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] CI / build / tooling
- [ ] Dependency upgrade

## How has this been tested?

<!-- Describe the tests you ran. Include commands and relevant output. -->

- [ ] `pytest internbackend/tests/ -v` (Python)
- [ ] `npm test` (Node)
- [ ] `npm run lint` (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual verification (describe below)

Manual verification notes:

```
<!-- paste output or screenshots -->
```

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style (`CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (`README.md`, `ARCHITECTURE.md`, etc.)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased"
- [ ] I have checked for breaking changes and noted them above
